title: rourea ovatifolia
intro: Rourea ovatifolia, also known as the 'Makabuhay' or 'Manchineel', is a tropical plant species native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. It is a small tree or shrub with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant's leaves, bark, and roots are rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. Herbal preparations of Rourea ovatifolia have been used to treat fever, cough, diarrhea, and other ailments, as well as to promote wound healing and reduce pain.
